issues: Code imports the correct adapter and uses its output columns correctly (date, value).
Signal logic does not implement the entry condition from the spec (7-day range <0.5% and volume surge) because volume data is unavailable; it only implements exit logic.
Entry logic always returns HOLD due to missing volume and range data, which does not follow the spec intent to enter on the specified trigger.
Exit logic correctly follows the spec intent (exit after 10 days or 5% price gain).
Position sizing logic matches spec allocation per signal (5%) and max exposure (20%) is implied by code structure.
Overall, failure to implement the entry trigger condition means the code does not fully follow the spec intent.
